impact: processVerifiedWebhook exposes both now and clock, which can be wired inconsistently by future adapters.
resolution: Removed the separate now input from processVerifiedWebhook so the processor now uses a single clock source for claim, retry backoff, and completion timestamps. Tests keep deterministic fixed-time helpers, and the lease-expiry invariant uses a sequence clock to prove time advancement without exposing two public time inputs.
